untranslatable_reason: Signal requires identification of 'tall candle formation' and 'yearly range' which cannot be precisely expressed with allowed indicators. 'Tall candle' typically requires historical candle height comparison over a year-long lookback period, and 'lowest third of yearly range' requires 252-bar yearly high/low calculation not available in the indicator set. Used approximations: range > atr_14 for tall candle proxy, price_pos_20 < 0.33 for lowest third of recent range proxy, but true yearly range calculation is untranslatable.
translation_notes: Approximated 'tall candle' as current candle range exceeding 14-period ATR; approximated 'lowest third of yearly range' as price_pos_20 < 0.33 (lowest third of 20-bar range as proxy since 252-bar yearly range unavailable); used close > prev_close as reversal confirmation after the tall candle formation; exit on reversal with close < prev_close. Original signal lacks specific exit conditions (AUTHOR_SILENT) so reasonable reversal-based exit applied.
